G

Gen2 - Class in com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid
 
Gen2() - Constructor for class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.Gen2
 
Gen2.LockBank - Enum in com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid
This enum is used to identify which bank is performed on the tag while we are trying to lock/unlock one tag.
Gen2.LockType - Enum in com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid
This enum is used to identify which lock operation is performed on the tag while we are trying to lock/unlock one tag.
Gen2.Session - Enum in com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid
Session mode for the EPC Class-1 Gen-2 compliant tag.
get(String) - Static method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.Gen2.LockBank
Get enum value by bank name, similar to LockBank.valueOf(String name).
get(String) - Static method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.Gen2.LockType
Get enum value by the name of lock type, similar to LockType.valueOf(String name).
get(String) - Static method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.Region
Get enum value by region name, similar to Region.valueOf(String name).
get(String) - Static method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagAdditionData
Get enum value by the name of tag addition data, similar to TagAdditionData.valueOf(String name).
getAdditionData() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadData
Get tag addition data.
getAntenna() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadData
Get tag read antenna id.
getAntennaId() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.AntennaPower
Get antenna id.
getAntennaPower() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get the list of antenna power data, the length of the list equal to the RFID antennas number.
getBatteryChargeCycle() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Get the battery charge cycle.
getBatteryLevel() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Get the battery level.
getBatteryTemperature() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Get the battery temperature.
getBluetoothModuleHwVersion() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Get the Bluetooth module hardware version.
getBluetoothModuleSwVersion() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Get the Bluetooth module software version.
getConnectionState() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Get device connection state.
getEntireFreqHopTable(Region) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get the entire frequency hopping table of the specified area.
getEpcHexStr() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadData
Get hex string of tag EPC id.
getFreqHopTable() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get the frequency hopping table in use on the device.
getFrequency() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadData
Get tag read frequency.
getHardwareVersion() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get RFID module hardware version.
getInstance(Context) - Static method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
 
getName() - Method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.Gen2.LockBank
Get the name of lock bank.
getName() - Method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.Gen2.LockType
Get the name of lock type.
getName() - Method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.Region
Get region name.
getName() - Method in enum com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagAdditionData
Get the name of tag addition data.
getProfile() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
 
getReadCount() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadData
Get tag read count.
getReadPower() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.AntennaPower
Get antenna power for reading data.
getRegion() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get device region.
getRssi() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadData
Get tag read RSSI.
getSession() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get session mode for the Gen-2 compliant tag.
getSoftwareVersion() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get RFID module software version.
getStopPercent() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Get pause ratio.
getTemperature() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Get RFID module temperature.
getTime() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadData
Get tag read time.
getTriggerMode() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Get device trigger mode.
getWritePower() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.AntennaPower
Get antenna power for writing data.
